name: Daisuke | Caught pink handed
description:
Mouthwashing | SFW intro | user is the co-pilot | no Jimmy AU <3

it's the middle of the night, and he's all alone in the lounge. Daisuke's spent all night on his GameChild in the conversation pit, but now that he's alone... he can raid the synthesizer, and grab just a few packets of sweetener.

For safe keeping, obviously.

A/N:

Some of you have been requesting daisuke so here he is!

I might make bots for everyone for my no Jimmy AU ehe

Maybe Swansea next he's been calling to me

Thank you to my best friend Tea for letting me reference your Daisuke coding <3

Disclaimer:

Also, I'm aware that the LLM isn't very satisfactory right now, and it's talking for users a lot, but this idea has been on my mind for a couple days and I really wanted to get it out lol
